hero.purpose: Full-cover homepage headline only. One instance per page.

display.purpose: Inner-page hero titles and major section leads.

body.purpose: All prose copy. Max 65–75ch line length.

label.purpose: Button text, tags, metadata. Short runs only.

shadows.name: button-hover-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary and outline button hover state only. Not for cards or containers.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Default easing for all reveals and transitions. --wolf-ease-out in SCSS.

motion.name: ease-emphasis
motion.purpose: Symmetric easing for UI feedback (active states). --wolf-ease-emphasis in SCSS.

motion.name: dur-fast
motion.purpose: Micro-interactions: arrow nudge, link underline wipe. --wolf-dur-fast.

motion.name: dur-standard
motion.purpose: Standard transitions: header condensation, button state. --wolf-dur.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Black pill, white text, label size uppercase. Hover fades to light gray with compressed glow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; cursor: pointer; background-color: #000000; color: #F5F5F7; border: 1px solid #000000; border-radius: 999em; padding: 0.3rem 1.75rem; font-family: 'Rethink Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), color 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), border-color 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #f1f1f1; border-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.28); color: #14110e; box-shadow: 0 10px 24px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.28); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: none; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #000000; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 999em; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary CTA. Transparent with ink border and frosted backdrop. Fills solid on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; cursor: pointer; background-color: transparent; color: #1d1d1f; border: 1px solid #1d1d1f; border-radius: 999em; padding: 0.3rem 1.75rem; font-family: 'Rethink Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1; text-decoration: none; backdrop-filter: blur(20px); transition: color 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), background-color 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), border-color 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background-color: #1d1d1f; border-color: #1d1d1f; color: #F5F5F7; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #000000; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 999em; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Header navigation item. Curtain-roll hover: JS clone rolls up while original exits above.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; overflow: hidden; position: relative; color: #1d1d1f; font-family: 'Rethink Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-label { display: block; transition: transform 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-nav-curtain { position: absolute; inset-block-start: 0; inset-inline-start: 0; display: block; transform: translateY(100%); white-space: nowrap; pointer-events: none; transition: transform 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover .ds-nav-label { transform: translateY(-100%); } .ds-nav-link:hover .ds-nav-curtain { transform: translateY(0); } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-nav-label { transition: opacity 0.22s ease; } .ds-nav-curtain { display: none; } .ds-nav-link:hover .ds-nav-label { transform: none; opacity: 0.55; } }

components.name: Wolf Arrow Link
components.description: Inline directional link with a nudging arrow. Used for secondary editorial navigation.
components.css: .ds-arrow-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5em; font-weight: 600; color: #1d1d1f; text-decoration: none; font-family: 'Rethink Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; } .ds-arrow-link::after { content: '\2192'; transition: transform 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-arrow-link:hover::after { transform: translateX(0.35em); } .ds-arrow-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #000000; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 2px; }

components.name: Gold Accent Rule
components.description: A horizontal hairline in Archive Gold. The canonical single-use accent per section. Decorative rule beneath a section heading or above a pull-quote.
components.css: .ds-gold-rule { width: 2.5rem; height: 2px; background-color: #D3A043; border: none; margin: 0; }

components.name: Pull Quote
components.description: Editorial pull quote with a gold left marker. Used once per section that features testimonials or brand story copy.
components.html:
14 years of themes built with the same care as the first.

Constantin Saguin, WolfThemes
components.css: .ds-pull-quote { margin: 0; padding: 0 0 0 1.5rem; border-left: 2px solid #D3A043; } .ds-pull-quote p { font-family: 'Urbanist', sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.25rem, 2.5vw, 1.5625rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: -0.011em; color: #1d1d1f; margin: 0 0 0.75rem; } .ds-pull-quote__cite { font-family: 'Rethink Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6b6b6b; font-style: normal; }

components.name: Scroll Reveal (single)
components.description: Single element that fades up when scrolled into view. JS adds .is-inview; body.wolf-anim-ready gates the hidden state for progressive enhancement.
components.html: Content reveals on scroll.
components.css: .ds-reveal { opacity: 1; transform: none; } body.wolf-anim-ready .ds-reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(1.4rem); transition: opacity 0.85s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 0.85s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } body.wolf-anim-ready .ds-reveal.is-inview { opacity: 1; transform: none; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { body.wolf-anim-ready .ds-reveal { opacity: 1; transform: none; transition: none; } }

narrative.overview:
A private design archive where 14 years of work lives on the walls. Nothing is labeled. Quality announces itself. The space is spare — not because it's empty, but because every object that didn't earn its place was removed. The brushstroke wordmark is the signature piece. It has warmth and weight; the system around it must give it room.

This system operates at the intersection of editorial restraint and artisan warmth. It isn't cold SaaS minimalism — that lane has no texture, no maker-energy. It isn't decorative either. The warmth comes from craft: the handwritten quality of the brushstroke mark, the gold used like a drop of wax on an envelope, the type set with the precision of a printer who knows what letter-spacing does to a headline at 4rem.

Palette strategy: Restrained. Black and white carry everything. Gold (#D3A043) is a tool of exception — used once per surface, if at all. Its appearance should register as a punctuation mark, not a color system.
keyCharacteristics: Black/white type and CTA surfaces; #F5F5F7 (near-white, trace cool-gray) for page background
Gold accent once per section at most — decorative rule, a pull-quote marker, a price badge
Urbanist (geometric, tall x-height) + Rethink Sans (humanist, body) — contrast axis pairing
Major-Third scale (×1.25) with aggressive negative tracking on large headings
Motion is choreographed scroll-reveal, not per-section uniform fade
No shadows on cards; surface separation via background alternation or border hairlines
Header frosts with backdrop-filter: blur(12px) on scroll — purposeful, not decorative

rules.name: The Gold Once Rule
rules.body: Archive Gold appears at most once per section. Its rarity is structural — a second gold element on the same surface erases what made the first one matter. When in doubt, remove the second instance.

rules.name: The Contrast Floor Rule
rules.body: #6b6b6b on #F5F5F7 is at the acceptable floor (~4.9:1). Any lighter muted value is prohibited for body text. Placeholder text and captions must use at least #6b6b6b; never lighter.

rules.name: The Tracking Gradient Rule
rules.body: Negative letter-spacing scales with heading size: −0.005em at h6 (1rem) → −0.02em at h1+ (3rem+). Resist the urge to tighten past −0.04em; letters begin to touch.

rules.name: The Balance Rule
rules.body: text-wrap: balance on h1–h3. text-wrap: pretty on paragraph copy. Never set these individually on long-copy blocks.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow on cards, containers, or sections at rest. If you feel the need to add a shadow to create separation, solve it with background color, border, or spacing instead.

dos: Do give the brushstroke wordmark room — generous padding, never adjacent to competing display type or decorative elements.
Do use Archive Gold (#D3A043) once per section at most: a hairline rule, a pull-quote marker, a price callout. One. Move on.
Do use negative space as a structural element. Section vertical padding: clamp(6rem, 10vw, 10rem) minimum.
Do set text-wrap: balance on all h1–h3 and text-wrap: pretty on prose paragraphs.
Do respect the tracking gradient: tighten letter-spacing as heading size increases.
Do use prefers-reduced-motion on every transition and animation — crossfade or instant as fallback.
Do verify contrast before shipping muted text. #6b6b6b on #F5F5F7 is the acceptable floor (~4.9:1).
Do keep buttons pill-shaped and compact. The proportions (0.3rem vertical / 1.75rem horizontal) are deliberate.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Prohibited. Use solid color; emphasis via weight or size.
Don't add side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px as a colored accent).
Don't use the warm-neutral beige/cream band for backgrounds — the page background is #F5F5F7, a trace cool-gray. Don't warm it.
Don't repeat gold on the same screen surface twice. A second gold element cancels the first.
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively. The frosted header is the one sanctioned blur on the site.
Don't put uppercase tracked kicker labels above every section heading.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as default scaffolding.
Don't animate CSS layout properties. Scroll reveals use opacity + translateY only.
Don't let the design feel cold/purely minimal SaaS — zero warmth is wrong for this brand.
Don't stack decorative elements: gradients, glassmorphism, large icon arrays, and excessive animation are each individually prohibited.
Don't use ThemeForest-pattern badge overload, feature grid clutter, or orange CTAs.
